chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6929 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 30357/2018 2. For hearing of main case 20.02.2025 Mr. Haider Ali Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Fahad Hussain Arijo, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, notice has been impugned herein, which shall be responded to by the petitioner before the issuing authority. It is articulated that it may be just and proper for the said notice to be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, and pending the aforesaid no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
